title: rungia pectinata
intro: Rungia pectinata, also known as the common Rungia, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rungia pectinata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Rungia pectinata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
